task.cwd: Current working directory. If not set, defaults to vscode workspace directory.
task.buildOption.forceRebuild: Force update all unit files and compile.(-B)
task.buildOption.msgIgnore: Specify which messages should not be displayed during compilation. Multiple error,warn,note numbers can be specified.(-vmxxx)
config.toolchain.compilerPath: Free Pascal compiler executable path. Example: `C:\lazarus\fpc\3.2.2\bin\x86_64-win64\fpc.exe` or `/usr/bin/fpc`.
config.toolchain.targetOS: Default Free Pascal target operating system. Example: `win64`, `win32`, `linux`, or `darwin`.
config.toolchain.targetCPU: Default Free Pascal target CPU. Example: `x86_64`, `i386`, or `aarch64`.
config.languageServer.executablePath: Full path to the language server executable to launch. Set this to NexusLS.exe/nexusls to override the bundled server; leave empty to use the bundled server.
config.languageServer.fpcSourceDirectory: Free Pascal source directory used by the language server for RTL/FCL navigation. [Select folder...](command:nexusPascal.languageServer.selectFpcSourceDirectory) Example: `C:\lazarus\fpc\3.2.2\source` or `/usr/local/share/fpcsrc`.
config.languageServer.trace.server: Trace communication between VS Code and pascal language server.
config.languageServer.initializationOpti: Main program file. If not specified, uses current file.
Specify how duplicate functions or definitions are displayed
Maximum number of auto code suggestions displayed
Function or procedure parameters automatically become template insertions
Automatically ignore parameters when inserting procedures or functions with parameters
Add current working directory to unit file search directories (i.e. -Fu)
Add current working directory to include directories (i.e. -Fi)
Perform syntax checking when files are opened and saved
Display syntax errors as diagnostic information
Allow displaying classes, functions, procedures... from workspace
Allow displaying classes, functions, procedures... from current document
Auto code suggestions contain minimal information
Show syntax error prompts in popup 'window/showMessage'
config.format.tabSize: Number of spaces to convert tab to.
config.debug.autoBuildBeforeLaunch: Automatically build the default Pascal project before launching the debugger when source files have changed
config.project.templateDirectories: Custom directories to search for project templates. Can be absolute paths or relative to workspace root.
